operational_knowledge_units.title: ChargingDatabaseModel stores charging areas and area entry/exit locations
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The ChargingDatabaseModel table stores separate charging areas and their entrance and exit locations. Each charging area contains several chargers.
observed_evidence: Slide bullet: 'The ChargingDatabaseModel table stores the separate charging areas as well as their entrance and exit locations. Each area has several chargers'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robotics Database Charging: ChargingDatabaseModel stores separate charging areas plus entrance and exit locations; each area has several chargers.

operational_knowledge_units.title: ChargingLocationDatabaseModel stores charger-to-station and tote stand associations
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The ChargingLocationDatabaseModel table stores individual chargers, the stations where they are located, and the tote stands associated with those chargers.
observed_evidence: Slide bullet: 'The ChargingLocationDatabaseModel table stores the individual chargers, the stations they are located at, and the tote stands associated with the chargers.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: ChargingLocationDatabaseModel stores individual chargers, the stations they are located at, and tote stands associated with the chargers.

operational_knowledge_units.title: ChargingThresholdsDatabaseModel provides thresholds used for AGV charging decisions
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The ChargingThresholdsDatabaseModel table stores values used in code to determine whether an AGV needs charging, can be released from a charger, or requires an emergency charge.
observed_evidence: Slide bullet: 'The ChargingThresholdsDatabaseModel table stores values we use in the code to decide whether an agv needs charged or can be kicked off the charger or need an emergency charge.'

relationships.target_component: AGV can be kicked off charger decision

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: ChargingThresholdsDatabaseModel stores values used by code to decide whether an AGV needs charged, can be kicked off the charger, or needs an emergency charge.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No explicit charging database procedure present on slide

Do not infer configuration or troubleshooting steps from the table descriptions alone.
